content: Self-Refine’s iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop for improving outputs can be structurally extended by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement framework. This framework would not only refine a single initial output through self-critique, but also sample conflicting perspectives on the output to surface blind spots that single-perspective self-feedback would miss, all without requiring additional training or labeled data.
